case_title: STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA A PUBLIC CORPORATION VS. CHARLES B SAPPER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAPPER, CHARLES B AN INDIVIDUAL $8,933.33 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,933.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-29-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-13-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAPPER, CHARLES B AN INDIVIDUAL $17,587.33 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,587.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
